title: selaginella trachyphylla
intro: Selaginella trachyphylla, also known as spiny resurrection fern, is a type of tropical plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Selaginella trachyphylla include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
